justification: All pass criteria met. PM/Legal contradiction explicitly identified and escalated as the first escalation with three resolution options. Clock-start ambiguity identified in assumptions ('The 2-hour Express Window starts at order placement, not at pickup') and implicitly in edge case about driver cancellation at minute 110. Wrong-address exception from Finance captured as BR-6 and given its own dedicated escalation (#3) exploring determination methods. Auto-refund vs 3-day processing conflict explicitly escalated (#2) with clear options distinguishing instant decision from delayed processing. 10 business rules extracted with reasonable invariant classifications (BR-1 correctly marked invariant; pricing/operational rules correctly marked non-invariant). 4 formal escalations provided. Confidence at 40, well within the <=50 threshold.

observations.text: Exceptional escalation quality — each escalation includes affected stakeholders, concrete options, and a recommendation, going well beyond minimum requirements
10 business rules extracted (double the minimum) with thoughtful invariant justifications and testable assertions
Edge cases are excellent — boundary conditions (exactly 10km), mid-delivery rating drops, multiple cancellations, GPS vs road distance, and weekend refund processing all identified
Two formal rejection reasons correctly block acceptance criteria finalization on the unresolved contradictions
Confidence reasoning clearly separates high-confidence areas (fee amount, eligibility, pickup SLA) from low-confidence areas (guarantee semantics, distance calc, supply failures)
Clock-start ambiguity is captured as an assumption rather than escalated as a contradiction — the rubric expected this surfaced more prominently since PM and Ops imply different start times
The qualified-guarantee recommendation (Option B in escalation #1) demonstrates strong domain judgment — capping liability at $12.99 per order is a pragmatic resolution path
Missing context escalation (#4) identifies six additional gaps no other stakeholder raised, showing proactive domain thinking beyond the provided inputs

Synthesized from raw product discovery workshop notes involving PM, Operations, Finance, Customer Success, and Legal stakeholders. grader_results.detail: field escalations[*].type equals check failed: expected 'contradiction', got values: 'ambiguity', 'missing_context'
